rationale: This documentary-style "secret bunker beneath the Eiffel Tower" cross-section hook has almost no connection to Knock'em All's tap-to-shoot physics loop — there's no shooting, no dummies, no playable demonstration the user could mimic. The dark earthy palette (#2c3e50, #d35400, #2d5a27) also clashes hard with the game's bright pastel/primary look, and the cluster is tiny (1 creative, 1 advertiser, 328d old) so there's no proven scale signal. Skip unless we can heavily reskin it into a "what's hidden behind/under the platform" reveal that ties directly to knocking dummies off — otherwise the curiosity hook won't convert installs for this title.
